\tzpentry{ID3372}{Instanton Action Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3372 introduces Instanton Action Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ S_{\text{instanton}}[d] = \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} \left[\tfrac{1}{2} m_{\text{eff}} $\left(\frac{\mathrm{d}d}{\mathrm{d}\tau}\right)$^2 - V(d)\right]\,\mathrm{d}\tau. \]
